name: deskflow
author: DeskFlow Team
description: Productivity time tracker for desktop apps and browser

scripts.build:electron: tsc src/main.ts src/preload.ts src/services/AIService.ts src/services/ProblemsService.ts src/services/RequestsService.ts src/services/SkillsService.ts src/services/SkillDSLParser.ts src/services/providers/types.ts src/services/providers/templates.ts src/services/providers/callProvider.ts src/services/providers/router.ts --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --outDir dist-electron --skipLibCheck && copy dist-electron\main.js dist-electron\main.cjs && copy dist-electron\preload.js dist-electron\preload.cjs && mkdir dist-electron\services 2>nul & mkdir dist-electron\services\providers 2>nul & copy dist-electron\services\AIService.js dist-electron\services\AIService.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\ProblemsService.js dist-electron\services\ProblemsService.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\RequestsService.js dist-electron\services\RequestsService.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\SkillsService.js dist-electron\services\SkillsService.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\SkillDSLParser.js dist-electron\services\SkillDSLParser.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\providers\types.js dist-electron\services\providers\types.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\providers\templates.js dist-electron\services\providers\templates.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\providers\callProvider.js dist-electron\services\providers\callProvider.cjs && copy dist-electron\services\providers\router.js dist-electron\services\providers\router.cjs && node fix-cjs-requires.cjs
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
